title: Outbox page=0 silently returns page 1 with wrong id URL
description:
In server.rs outbox(), page is declared as Option<u32> and the offset is computed as:

  let page = query.page.unwrap_or(1);  // page=0 stays 0
  let offset = (page as i64 - 1) * per_page;  // 0-1 = -1, * 20 = -20

SQLite treats a negative OFFSET as 0, so page=0 returns the same first-page results as page=1. The OrderedCollectionPage response has id set to "...?page=0" which is a valid-looking but incorrect page identifier. An ActivityPub crawler that tries page=0 after seeing first=...?page=1 (or that iterates from 0) gets duplicated first-page content with a confusing id.

Fix: clamp page to a minimum of 1 before computing offset, or return 400 for page=0.
close_reason: All pass 2 fixes applied: circuit breaker reset, persona-scoped 410, SSRF private IP block, tokio::fs, URL scheme validation, Content-Type, page clamp, watch dedup
